meaning: 混频器;n.混合者,搅拌器,[电] 混频器
examples: Well, in that case, you might like a mixer.
A cement mixer agitates the cement until it is ready to pour.
Living in this world is similar to the fate of a stone in a cement mixer.
And it can be used as a stand-alone mixer when connected to CDJs and turntables.
Once when I was a little boy I received as a gift a toy cement mixer.
